title: Assert fails on invalid Verilog input
body:
The following testcase triggers an assert in icarus verilog (tested with 027e060, current git head):

```
module demo(output [63:0] y);
  assign y = 1'b_;
endmodule
```

Here is the error I get:

```
$ iverilog test.v 
ivl: verinum.cc:364: verinum::V verinum::get(unsigned int) const: Assertion `idx < nbits_' failed.
sh: line 1:  2885 Done                    /usr/local/lib/ivl/ivlpp -L -F"/tmp/ivrlg25884e2fb" -f"/tmp/ivrlg5884e2fb" -p"/tmp/ivrli5884e2fb"
      2886 Aborted                 | /usr/local/lib/ivl/ivl -C"/tmp/ivrlh5884e2fb" -C"/usr/local/lib/ivl/vvp.conf" -- -
```

PS: This test case originates from a [bug report for yosys](https://github.com/cliffordwolf/yosys/issues/81).
code_blocks:
$ iverilog test.v 
ivl: verinum.cc:364: verinum::V verinum::get(unsigned int) const: Assertion `idx < nbits_' failed.
sh: line 1:  2885 Done                    /usr/local/lib/ivl/ivlpp -L -F"/tmp/ivrlg25884e2fb" -f"/tmp/ivrlg5884e2fb" -p"/tmp/ivrli5884e2fb"
      2886 Aborted                 | /usr/local/lib/ivl/ivl -C"/tmp/ivrlh5884e2fb" -C"/usr/local/lib/ivl/vvp.conf" -- -
